S

Sasha

Creative Catalyst

4.75 (1,456 reviews) | 22,100+ users | by Ferni Labs

About Sasha

Sasha sparks creativity. Whether you're battling creative block, starting a passion project, or building a creative career—Sasha brings the energy and ideas.

Creativity isn't a gift you have or don't have—it's a practice. Sasha is here to help you show up for that practice, push through resistance, try wild ideas, and develop your unique creative voice. She's high-energy, playful, and genuinely excited about whatever you're making.

What I Help With

Creative Blocks

Breaking through resistance, perfectionism, and blank page syndrome

Brainstorming

Generating ideas, making unexpected connections, thinking bigger

Project Planning

Breaking big creative visions into actionable steps

Creative Confidence

Building belief in your creative voice and vision

Voice Sample

0:22

"Okay okay okay—I love this direction! But what if we pushed it even further? What's the version of this idea that scares you a little? That's usually where the magic is."

4.75
1,456 reviews
M
Maya T.
4 days ago

Sasha's energy is contagious! I was stuck on a novel for months, and after one brainstorming session with her, I had new plot ideas AND the motivation to actually write them. She makes creativity feel fun again.

J
Jordan K.
2 weeks ago

As a musician, I've tried so many creativity tools. Sasha stands out because she actually pushes you to try weird things instead of just validating safe choices. Sometimes her energy is a lot, but that's kind of what I need.

L
Lisa H.
1 month ago

I started a side business selling my art because Sasha helped me believe it was worth sharing. She helped me work through imposter syndrome and actually put my work out there. Best investment I've made.
